task: I need a quick way to reply to a client who sent a vague note and wants a revised concept by end of day. Can you give me a couple of reply options — one very short and one a little more polished — so I can pick the cleanest one?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two clean options you can send:

**Very short:**
> Got it — I’ll revise and send an updated concept by end of day.

**A little more polished:**
> Understood — I’ll tighten the concept and send a revised version by end of day.

If you want, I can also give you:
- a slightly firmer version
- a warmer client-friendly version
- or one that buys you a little more room on timing without sounding evasive

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that’s clean. The short one works.

Maybe just a touch sharper on the polished version:

> Understood — I’ll refine the concept and send an updated version by end of day.

That reads a little more deliberate.
